text: Solid local spot — friendly staff, came back twice this week.
Quality has been consistent. Reliable when I'm in a hurry.
Good vibes, slightly pricey for what you get but worth it once.
Loved the atmosphere. Will bring friends next time.
Excellent service. Owner remembered my order on the second visit.
Decent, but the line at peak hours is rough.
Cozy, clean, and the prices are fair.
Best in the neighborhood, no notes.
